name: Corned Beef and Cabbage Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 Beef flavor bouillon cube or 1 teaspoon instant beef bouillon
6 New potatoes, unpeeled and quartered (see note)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 5-quart Dutch oven, combine corned beef and water.
2. Bring to a boil over high heat.
3. Reduce heat; cover and simmer for 15 minutes.
4. Skim off any scum that rises to the surface.
5. Add bouillon cube, onion, garlic, peppercorns, cloves, and bay leaf (if using).
6. Simmer covered an additional 3 to 4 hours or until meat is tender.
7. Remove meat from broth; let cool.
8. Skim fat from broth.
9. Cut meat into bite-size pieces; return to broth.
10. Stir in carrots and potatoes. Bring to a boil.
11. Reduce heat; cover and simmer for 15 minutes.
12. Stir in cabbage. Simmer covered an additional 15 minutes or until all vegetables are tender.
13. Remove peppercorns, cloves, and bay leaf (if used).
14. Makes 10 servings (1 1/4 cups each).
